texto: Now that he was semidressed, I recovered enough to say, “Not really. But I guess if you want me to hold a conversation with you, you should keep your clothes on.”He gestured for me to follow him through the house, and I thought I heard him mutter, “Conversation is so overrated.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Renae Kaye sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Now that he was semidressed, I recovered enough to say, “Not really. But I guess if you want me t…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, conversation, semidressed, útil em momentos de reflexao.
